summary.audit_type: READ ONLY - no scene edits, no object deletes, no save

why_selected_label_repeats: One object can be linked into multiple collections. The Outliner shows the same object under each collection, so selecting it highlights every listing. Deleting that object deletes it from all listings. Use unlink/remove from collection to remove one collection listing only.
shared_mesh_warning: If several objects share the same data_name and data_users is greater than 1, they may share the same mesh data-block. Editing mesh data on one can affect linked copies unless made single-user.
